Part.Source:
For Each Order GnreConEmpCod, GnreConFilCod, GnreConUfeCod Where GnreConEmpCod = &parmGnreConEmpCod Where GnreConFilCod = &parmGnreConFilCod Where GnreConUfeCod = &parmGnreConUfeCod
Do Case Case &Tipo = 'REC' For Each Order GnreConEmpCod, GnreConFilCod, GnreConUfeCod, GnreConRecCod Where GnreConRecCod = &parmGnreConRecCod
Do Case Case &Mode = 'UPD' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Registro alterado com sucesso." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) GnreConRecDes = &NewDescricao Case &Mode = 'DLT' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Registro deletado com sucesso." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) Delete EndCase Exit EndFor
Case &Tipo = 'PRO' For Each Order GnreConEmpCod, GnreConFilCod, GnreConUfeCod, GnreConRecCod, GnreConProCod Where GnreConRecCod = &parmGnreConRecCod Where GnreConProCod = &parmCodigo
Do Case Case &Mode = 'UPD' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Registro alterado com sucesso." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) GnreConProDes = &NewDescricao Case &Mode = 'DLT' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Registro deletado com sucesso." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) Delete EndCase Exit EndFor
Case &Tipo = 'DET' For Each Order GnreConEmpCod, GnreConFilCod, GnreConUfeCod, GnreConRecCod, GnreConDetCod Where GnreConRecCod = &parmGnreConRecCod Where GnreConDetCod = &parmCodigo
Do Case Case &Mode = 'UPD' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Registro alterado com sucesso." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) GnreConDetDes = &NewDescricao Case &Mode = 'DLT' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Registro deletado com sucesso." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) Delete EndCase Exit EndFor
Case &Tipo = 'DOC' For Each Order GnreConEmpCod, GnreConFilCod, GnreConUfeCod, GnreConRecCod, GnreConDocCod Where GnreConRecCod = &parmGnreConRecCod Where GnreConDocCod = &parmCodigo
Do Case Case &Mode = 'UPD' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Registro alterado com sucesso." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) GnreConDocDes = &NewDescricao Case &Mode = 'DLT' msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Successo!", "Registro deletado com sucesso." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) Delete EndCase Exit EndFor
EndCase Exit EndFor Commit
Parm(In:&Mode, In:&Tipo, In:&parmGnreConEmpCod, In:&parmGnreConFilCod, In:&parmGnreConUfeCod, In:&parmGnreConRecCod, In:&parmCodigo, In:&NewDescricao);
